errors.lastParamVariadic: Only the last parameter may be variadic.
errors.jsStyleVariableName: Cannot start with a number and may only contain letters, numbers, _, and $.

inlineCodeSyntax.name: Inline code syntax
inlineCodeSyntax.desc: The syntax to use within the start of inline code to render a formula.

codeBlockLanguage.name: Code block language
codeBlockLanguage.desc: The language name to use for a code block to render a formula.

deleteModal.title: Confirm deletion
deleteModal.warning: This will permanently delete the global formula named "{{name}}"

name.name: Name
name.desc: The name to use to reference this global formula.

deleteModal.title: Confirm deletion
deleteModal.warning: This will permanently delete the custom function named "{{name}}"

deleteAllModal.title: Confirm deletion
deleteAllModal.desc: This will permanently delete all custom functions.

name.name: Name
name.desc: The name to use to reference this global formula.

scope.name: Scope
scope.typeDesc: Type - call as a function of the specified type:

scopeType.name: Scope type
scopeType.desc: The data type to scope this function to. Use the implicit parameter "self" in the function's formula definition to refer to the value the function is being called on.

name.name: Name
name.desc: The name to refer to this parameter within this function's formula definition.

type.name: Type
type.desc: The data type of this parameter.

optional.name: Optional
optional.desc: If true, the parameter is not required to be passed when calling this function and should be treated as possibly undefined in the function's formula definition.

variadic.name: Variadic
variadic.desc: This may only be set to true if it's the last parameter. If true, multiple values may be provided for the parameter and should be treated as a "List" in the function's formula definition.
